name: California Tamale Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the corn meal, milk, and beaten egg.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients, except for the cheese, to the mixture.
3. Pour the mixture into a crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on high heat for 3 to 4 hours.
5. Sprinkle the grated Cheddar cheese over the top.
6. Cover and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
